# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'requirements-dev.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        id: cache-build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            .nuxt
          key: build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            build-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache ESLint and Prettier
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintcache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: lint-cache-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            lint-cache-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache pytest
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
          key: pytest-cache-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            pytest-cache-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run allowed postinstall scripts
        run: npm rebuild

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then
            pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi

      - name: Generate environment config
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          echo "NODE_ENV=test" > .env.test
          echo "LOG_LEVEL=info" >> .env.test
          echo "API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000" >> .env.test

      - name: Lint JavaScript
        run: npx eslint . --cache --cache-location .eslintcache

      - name: Lint Python
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          python -m flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics
          python -m mypy . --cache-dir .mypy_cache || true

      - name: Run Node.js tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test

      - name: Run Python tests
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          python -m pytest --cache-dir=.pytest_cache -v --tb=short

      - name: Build project
        if: steps.cache-build.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm run build --if-present
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-reports
          path: |
            coverage/
            htmlcov/
          retention-days: 7

  dependency-audit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    needs: build-and-test

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'requirements-dev.txt') }}

      - name: Audit Node.js dependencies
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Audit Python dependencies
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install pip-audit
          pip-audit --strict
        continue-on-error: false
